scope: Henke Wonen portal UI/UX and design-system audit

duplicatePatterns.pattern: table markup repeated in domain components
duplicatePatterns.recommendation: Create DataTable and migrate catalog/import/customer/project/supplier tables
Create Field, Input, Select, Textarea and validation helper components
Replace with layout primitives and spacing tokens

duplicatePatterns.pattern: loading, empty and error states use same empty-state class
duplicatePatterns.recommendation: Create semantic LoadingState, EmptyState, ErrorState and Alert components

duplicatePatterns.pattern: page headers repeated in Astro pages
duplicatePatterns.recommendation: Create PageHeader component with actions and optional breadcrumbs

uxIssues.issue: No topbar or breadcrumbs, making detail pages lose context
uxIssues.recommendation: Add Topbar and Breadcrumbs to PortalShell

uxIssues.issue: Sidebar has no active state or grouped navigation
uxIssues.recommendation: Add active route highlighting and group settings/import sections

uxIssues.issue: Dashboard shows metrics but not enough actionable daily work
uxIssues.recommendation: Add open actions, blocked imports, quotes to follow up and planning

uxIssues.issue: Catalog table is too basic for thousands of products
uxIssues.recommendation: Use server-side DataTable with filters for supplier, category, productKind, status and price source

uxIssues.issue: Import and VAT review screens are data dense and hard to scan
uxIssues.recommendation: Add DataTable, tabs, filter bars, confirmations and compact summaries

uxIssues.issue: Quote builder is functional but not ergonomic enough for in-store selling
uxIssues.recommendation: Create quote workbench with sticky totals, product picker, room grouping and line type templates

uxIssues.issue: Customer list has no search or filters
uxIssues.recommendation: Add Customer DataTable with search, status and type filters

uxIssues.issue: Workflow actions are buttons, not a clear process view
uxIssues.recommendation: Add project workflow rail and separate internal/customer-visible notes

uxIssues.issue: Duplicate EAN comparison is text heavy inside table cells
uxIssues.recommendation: Use comparison cards or a detail drawer with side-by-side product data

accessibilityIssues.recommendation: Add consistent focus rings for buttons, inputs, selects, tabs and links

accessibilityIssues.issue: Status is often indicated by color only
accessibilityIssues.recommendation: Use StatusBadge with text labels, icons and accessible labels

accessibilityIssues.issue: Error and empty states share the same visual component
accessibilityIssues.recommendation: Split Alert, ErrorState, EmptyState and LoadingState

accessibilityIssues.issue: Icon-only actions are not centrally forced to have aria-label

accessibilityIssues.recommendation: Add Tabs component with tablist semantics and aria-selected

accessibilityIssues.issue: Mobile table behavior is not designed

implementationPhases.name: Design tokens and base UI components
implementationPhases.goal: Stabilize visual primitives and remove repeated low-level markup
acceptanceCriteria: Button, Badge, Field, Alert, EmptyState and LoadingState exist
No regression in npm run check/build
Focus and disabled states are consistent

implementationPhases.name: Portal shell and navigation
implementationPhases.goal: Add consistent page context and navigation

implementationPhases.name: DataTable and filter/search patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog uses server-side filters and pagination
Import rows can filter by rowKind/status
DataTable has loading, empty, error and responsive states

implementationPhases.name: Imports, VAT review and data issues polish
implementationPhases.goal: Make production release flow safe and quickly scannable

implementationPhases.name: Customers, projects and quotes UX polish
acceptanceCriteria: Customer detail has timeline and loaned item structure
Quote builder has sticky totals and product picker

implementationPhases.name: Responsive and accessibility pass
implementationPhases.goal: Make the portal reliable on laptop, tablet and mobile
acceptanceCriteria: Alerts and loading states are semantic
